practice_financial_overview.title: Practice Financial Overview
practice_financial_overview.summary: Practice revenue from QuickBooks and production/collections from SoftDent import cache. Dental A/R is not sourced from QuickBooks.

accounts_payable_automation.title: Accounts Payable Automation
accounts_payable_automation.summary: QuickBooks expense totals and posting-queue workflow counts from the import cache.

smart_claims_and_receivables.title: Smart Claims & Receivables
smart_claims_and_receivables.summary: SoftDent claims totals from imported practice operations data; dental A/R is unavailable until explicit SoftDent A/R export is present.

care_delivery_performance.title: Care Delivery Performance
care_delivery_performance.summary: Practice-wide SoftDent operational activity from the import cache; patient A/R balances are unavailable until explicit SoftDent A/R export is present.
